summary: Completed P1 feature testing for ChiPi Link: Badge customization APIs, Google Photos video fix, PinPanClub mobile, admin dashboard, and public login validation

flaky_endpoints.issue: When sending empty object to reset config, returns empty object instead of DEFAULT_BADGE_CONFIG
flaky_endpoints.impact: Badge config reset doesn't restore defaults properly

ui_bugs.issue: Module loads but navigation to /admin#badge-config sometimes requires multiple attempts

integration_issues.issue: Media player section not found on homepage despite MediaPlayer component implementation

passed_tests: Badge Config API: GET /api/admin/badge-config returns default configuration with order_statuses and item_statuses
Badge Config API: PUT /api/admin/badge-config successfully saves updated configuration
Badge Config API: GET /api/admin/badge-config/public works without authentication
Admin login with credentials teck@koh.one / Acdb##0897 successful
Admin dashboard sidebar sections load correctly including all modules
Public login at /login shows only LaoPan OAuth button (no email/password fields)
PinPanClub at 375px width shows no horizontal overflow on main page
PinPanClub competitions page renders without overflow on mobile
Badge Config API structure validation passes for both order_statuses and item_statuses
Badge configuration updates are properly persisted to database
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix badge config reset functionality in /app/backend/modules/admin/routes.py - ensure empty config returns DEFAULT_BADGE_CONFIG
Verify media player component is properly rendered on landing page homepage
Investigate Badge Customization module navigation reliability in admin dashboard
